FFlagFoundationDialogRootZIndex2_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the stacking order of dialog windows in the UI.
FFlagFoundationDialogRootZIndex2_Staged.purpose: Ensures important dialogs appear above other UI elements for better visibility.

FFlagLuauUnreducedTypeFunctionsDontTrigg.mechanism: Prevents warnings for certain type functions in the Luau scripting language.
FFlagLuauUnreducedTypeFunctionsDontTrigg.purpose: Allows developers to write code more freely without unnecessary warnings.

FFlagFCHighlightOptimization.mechanism: Improves how highlights are rendered in the game, making it more efficient.
FFlagFCHighlightOptimization.purpose: Players experience smoother visuals and better performance when highlights are used.

FFlagResolvePropertySourceConflictWithPs.mechanism: Fixes issues where property sources could conflict with pseudo elements in scripts.
FFlagResolvePropertySourceConflictWithPs.purpose: Ensures that game developers can reliably use properties without unexpected behavior, leading to more stable games.

FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.mechanism: Addresses a bug that caused issues when switching between monitors in fullscreen mode on Windows.
FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.purpose: Players can switch monitors without problems, enhancing their gaming experience.

FIntVideoCaptureMaxShortSideLowMem_IXP.mechanism: Sets a limit on the shortest side of video captures to optimize memory usage.
FIntVideoCaptureMaxShortSideLowMem_IXP.purpose: Players can capture videos without using too much memory, allowing for smoother gameplay and better performance.

DFFlagRbxStorageReportSysMem_Staged.mechanism: Enables reporting of system memory usage for better performance tracking.
DFFlagRbxStorageReportSysMem_Staged.purpose: Helps developers understand memory usage, leading to improved game performance for players.

FFlagLuaExplorerFileSync2.mechanism: Enhances file synchronization for Lua scripts in the Explorer.
FFlagLuaExplorerFileSync2.purpose: Allows developers to see real-time updates to their scripts, improving collaboration.

DFFlagSimOptimizeBoneUpdates.mechanism: Reduces the frequency of bone updates in simulations.
DFFlagSimOptimizeBoneUpdates.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag in games with complex animations.

FFlagAddNumCloudTableEntriesLocalizedInL.mechanism: Adds support for localized entries in cloud tables based on player locale.
FFlagAddNumCloudTableEntriesLocalizedInL.purpose: Provides players with content that is tailored to their language and region.

FFlagBootcampCLI173012_Staged.mechanism: Implements a staged rollout of new command-line interface features.
FFlagBootcampCLI173012_Staged.purpose: Gives new developers a better onboarding experience with improved tools.

DFIntNetStackDummyClientMaxConnectionAtt.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of connection attempts for dummy clients in the network stack.
DFIntNetStackDummyClientMaxConnectionAtt.purpose: Enhances network stability by preventing excessive connection retries.

FFlagSendTelemetryOnWebViewOpenRequest_S.mechanism: Sends data when a web view is requested to open.
FFlagSendTelemetryOnWebViewOpenRequest_S.purpose: Helps improve the experience by tracking how often web views are used.

FFlagRemoveStaleChildConnections2_Staged.mechanism: Cleans up outdated connections between game elements.
FFlagRemoveStaleChildConnections2_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance and reduces lag for players.

FFlagHlsPlaylistNoCacheByDefault_Staged.mechanism: Prevents storing video playlists in memory by default.
FFlagHlsPlaylistNoCacheByDefault_Staged.purpose: Ensures players always get the latest video content without delays.
